required_governor_checks: repository survey must identify candidate source and test files before mutation
implementation must expose patch_source, operation_count, changed_files, and rollback evidence
verification must run allowlisted commands or record explicit blockers
review must approve or produce a focused revision_plan
final manifest must preserve execution evidence, blockers, and next_safe_action
test repair tasks must preserve failing-test diagnostics and rerun the relevant command after repair
API/contract tasks must preserve public response shape and schema compatibility evidence

worker_brief.purpose: Review the implementation package for scope, test evidence, and unsafe assumptions.
worker_brief.brief: Judge scope, evidence, verification, and revision needs.

implementation must expose patch_source, operation_count, changed_files, and rollback evidence
verification must run allowlisted commands or record explicit blockers
review must approve or produce a focused revision_plan

worker_brief.handoff_question: Can the final packager mark this ready?

warnings.message: Only explicit CERAXIA_PATCH operations are supported by this prototype patch worker.
Changed file(s) outside ranked repo map should be manually checked for scope drift: app/settings.json, app/config_loader.py, bin/run-app.sh, tests/test_config_loader.py
Changed source file(s) have no static linked tests in repo map; verify coverage manually: app/config_loader.py
Ceraxia currently supports only explicit patch operations; autonomous code synthesis is not enabled yet.
